name: @open-agents-toolkit/contracts
description: Solidity contracts for the open-agents-toolkit (ERC-8004, ERC-7857)

scripts.deploy:sepolia: yes | hardhat ignition deploy ignition/modules/Deploy.ts --network sepolia --reset
scripts.deploy:zeroG: yes | hardhat ignition deploy ignition/modules/Deploy.ts --network zeroGGalileo --reset
scripts.addOracle:sepolia: yes | hardhat ignition deploy ignition/modules/AddOracle.ts --network sepolia --reset
scripts.addOracle:zeroG: yes | hardhat ignition deploy ignition/modules/AddOracle.ts --network zeroGGalileo --reset --parameters ignition/parameters.zeroG.json
scripts.setKeeper:sepolia: yes | hardhat ignition deploy ignition/modules/SetKeeper.ts --network sepolia --reset
scripts.setKeeper:zeroG: yes | hardhat ignition deploy ignition/modules/SetKeeper.ts --network zeroGGalileo --reset --parameters ignition/parameters.zeroG.json
scripts.zeroG: npm run build && npm run deploy:zeroG && npm run addOracle:zeroG && npm run setKeeper:zeroG && npm run setup-env:zeroG && npm run verify:zeroG
